---
title: "About This Blog"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/claire-mcfarland-157292340
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/chmcfa23
---

A collection of blog posts made for Data Visualization, Spring 2026.
